phrase_template: Hello. This is {Voice}. You're listening to {Voice}, a Hark voice sample. I can announce agent questions and listen for your reply.
notes: Each sample speaks the voice display name ≥2 times via {Voice} in phrase.txt.
Wake name iris ≠ TTS voice_id iris; default pairing often Iris + eve.
OpenAI/MiniMax filled after xAI dogfood feedback.
